calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Default Judgemnt; Points And Authorities
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:12:17 a.m. and concluding at 10:48:05 a.m.

Plaintiff GSV Futures LLC appearing represented by Shanshan Zou.
Defendant Chuang Liu not appearing.

JIONGWEI YANG and EVA WANG are sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.
Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

JIONGWEI YANG is examined by the Court.
EVA WANG is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plantiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the First amended complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff GSV Futures LLC, and against Defendant Chuang Liu for Declaratory Relief.
(see scanned document)(D505)
